audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L103 requires both `msg.sender == address(s_auction)` and `from == address(this)`. The only call site invoking `auctionCallback` on AuctionBidder is `BaseAuction.bid()` (L449), which always passes `msg.sender` (the bidder) as `from`; for `from == address(this)` to hold, AuctionBidder itself must have initiated the auction bid. Both conditions are independently necessary and jointly sufficient — no alternative code path bypasses either guard.
